name: Coconut Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, cornstarch, light cream, butter, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Heat over medium heat until the mixture reaches a soft ball stage (234 - 238 F).
3. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
4. Beat the mixture until it is creamy.
5. Add raisins, chopped nuts, toasted coconut, and vanilla extract.
6. Continue beating until the mixture can be handled without breaking apart.
7. Turn the dough out onto a surface dusted with powdered sugar.
8. Knead the dough until it is smooth and creamy.
9. Shape the dough into a roll.
10. Sprinkle additional toasted coconut on top.
11. Slice the roll using a sharp knife.
